Video.summary: A lie detector test could decide the fate of Andrecia and Alfred's tumultuous marriage filled with suspicion and regret.
Video.title: Taylor vs. Taylor

Video.summary: Deputies Payne and Miller apprehend a burglar under the influence at an animal hospital. The SED conducts a probation check on a known flop house.
Video.title: I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes

Image.alt: I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes

Video.summary: Deputy Braafladt attempts to find the man responsible for giving his girlfriend a black eye. A woman is arrested behind a closed business in the middle of the night.
Video.title: Abusing and Abusers

Video.summary: WENET breaks up a party to arrest a group of illegal Mexicans for cock fighting.
Video.title: Pot, Pipe Bombs and Clueless People

Image.alt: Pot, Pipe Bombs and Clueless People
Pot, Pipe Bombs and Clueless People
Pot, Pipe Bombs and Clueless People

Video.summary: Anissa Williams sues her dad, Nathaniel Green, for $5,000, claiming he owes her money despite the heartbreak. Nathaniel argues the money was family kindness and countersues for $1,000 for slander.
Video.title: Abandoned by Her Father

Video.summary: Edward Grice sues ex-girlfriend Denise Beard for $5,000 after she crashed a car he leased for her, pocketed the insurance payout, and left him to cover repairs. Denise claims the check was stolen and Edward acted on his own to pay for repairs.
Video.title: Insurance Fraud

Video.summary: Samantha sues her ex, Matthew, for $500 or the return of their dog, Daisy, claiming he's aggressive and unfit to care for her. Matthew counters, insisting Daisy is his since he saved her from the pound.
Video.title: Exes at War

Video.summary: Accusations of emotional abuse and infidelity bring an Illinois couple to court.
Video.title: Walton vs. Hamilton

Video.summary: A polygraph test will determine if Deandre has been unfaithful to his girlfriend, Olivia.
Video.title: Shiel vs. Spraggins

Video.summary: Suspicions of cheating force Dawn to petition his girlfriend, Alexandra, to a polygraph to test her loyalty.
Video.title: Barnes vs. Edge

Video.summary: Aspiring social media star Mike sues ex-girlfriend Sidney for nonpayment after she profited from an explicit adult video.
Video.title: Barham vs. Starr

Video.summary: Quintin sues his ex-girlfriend, Lashana, for custody of their dogs after she kicks him out of the house.
Video.title: Grice vs. Jackson

Video.summary: Dave Shelton sues Gary Garver for $10,000, claiming unpaid wages for two years on Garver's radio show. Shelton says he quit due to on-air mistreatment, but Garver insists Shelton was just a guest and never requested payment.
Video.title: Radio Riot

Video.summary: Deborah sues Charles for $800 after he left her tree-removal job unfinished, leaving her yard in chaos. Charles claims he started the work on a massive tree but needed more time, only for Deborah to hire someone else. Now, she wants her money back.
Video.title: Tree Cutter Tantrum

Video.summary: Shahbod Hosseini sues Rosie Dehghani for $1,300, claiming her pharmacy tech course was a scam. Rosie counters that Shahbod didn’t complete the work and owes her $700. She insists her program is legitimate, with students earning high-paying jobs.
Video.title: You Scammed Me Into Taking Your Online Class

Image.alt: You Scammed Me Into Taking Your Online Class
You Scammed Me Into Taking Your Online Class
You Scammed Me Into Taking Your Online Class

Video.summary: Alexandria Pham claims Christy Lynn Gibel ran a red light while texting, crashed into her car, and lacks valid insurance. Christy denies fault, arguing Alexandria caused the crash. Now, Alexandria is suing for $3,575.61 in damages.
Video.title: Little Women: LA Star in Court!

Image.alt: Little Women: LA Star in Court!
Little Women: LA Star in Court!
Little Women: LA Star in Court!

Video.summary: Mary Hughes sues Jacqueline for $1,400, claiming she was scammed out of a new window. Jacqueline says delays were due to reordering the correct custom window and claims prep work costs justify no refund.
Video.title: Crooked Contractor

Video.summary: Plaintiff Davey James sues lawyer Benjamin Yu for $5,000, claiming Yu failed to represent him in a DUI case after being arrested himself. Yu countersues for $2,500, citing unpaid fees for services rendered.
Video.title: Lawyer Arrested for Bribing a Court Official

Image.alt: Lawyer Arrested for Bribing a Court Official
Lawyer Arrested for Bribing a Court Official
Lawyer Arrested for Bribing a Court Official

Video.summary: Tyrone claims his ex wife Tania got him falsely arrested 3 times so he's here to sue her for $3,000.
Video.title: Reformed Pimp Sues His Madam

Video.summary: A man says he dated the defendant for 20 years, and they have a child together, but now that he's married, the defendant has become extremely jealous of his new relationship; he sues for breach of contract, an electric bill and emotional distress.
Video.title: Love, Lies, and Legal Ties

Video.summary: A photographer says the defendants told her their wedding ceremony was canceled due to the pandemic, so she refunded their money; she now believes that was a lie, so she's suing.
Video.title: Save the Fake Date

Video.summary: Andrea wants $3000 from her ex-boyfriend after stealing from her during her active addiction.
Video.title: Taking Advantage

Video.summary: Ansyl is suing his former tenant for two months' rent saying she was working as a prostitute while renting.
Video.title: Ransacked by a Landlord

Video.summary: Corina broke up with Anthony after choking her but after finding out she's pregnant, sues for child support.
Video.title: Get It On Record

Video.summary: Kentra wants a paternity test after the man who signed her birth certificate has been in and out of her life.
Video.title: Believing the Birth Certificate

Video.summary: A woman hired her friend of 15 years to do her son's and husband's tax returns, but says the friend failed to complete them, so she's suing for a refund.
Video.title: H&R Best Friend

Video.summary: Eleanor believes that the defendant may be the daughter of her brother, who has been deceased for 18 years.
Video.title: Trying to Make It Official

Video.summary: Dolly Parton impersonator Charlene is suing her cousin over a loan. Tiffany says she never wanted repayment.
Video.title: Hello Dolly

Video.summary: Delvon's suing for wifi costs and alienation of affection. Tedmenia says she's just chatting online!
Video.title: Anti-Social Network

Video.summary: Were they loans? Was she funding her gambling boyfriend in order to rake in the profit?
Video.title: Going for Broke

Video.summary: The claws come out when two sisters slug it out. When the bombshells drop the emotions fly.
Video.title: Sisters Slug it Out

Video.summary: Melvin is suing a real estate broker for a bogus electric bill and lost rent, claiming she stole his identity to pay her bills. Jacqueline catogorically denies any of Melvin outrageous claims.
Video.title: Buyers are Liars

Video.summary: Mark is suing his sister over his home's repair work. She claims that he is lying and exaggerating.
Video.title: A Riff in the Family

Video.summary: Kent loaned Elizabath five grand to help pay for her dental work but is now asking for it back.
Video.title: Love Bites

Video.summary: Kim Savage claims her brother John owes her rent and money for appliances, while John argues that he paid the rent and wants to be compensated for the emotional distress he encountered when he and his three children were tossed out on the street.
Video.title: Hey Bro, You Owe! Hey Sis, You Dissed!

Image.alt: Hey Bro, You Owe! Hey Sis, You Dissed!
Hey Bro, You Owe! Hey Sis, You Dissed!
Hey Bro, You Owe! Hey Sis, You Dissed!

Video.summary: Is James splitting hairs with Carle over his bad hair day or is there just a hair more about this case?
Video.title: Splitting Hairs

Video.summary: Richard argues that Tanya tried to leave his child's birthday party early so he had every right to stop her.
Video.title: The Princess Party Disaster

Video.summary: While shopping for a website designer Brent met Joe but what a tangle website of woes did they weave.
Video.title: Website of Woes

Video.summary: Deputy Carpenter investigates a marijuana grow and home theft. Deputy Bradley responds to an abusive alcoholic mother.
Video.title: Follow the Water

Video.summary: Deputy Payne shows us a typical day for the life of a deputy in El Dorado County.
Video.title: All in A Night's Patrol

Video.summary: An uncooperative felon tests the patience of the SED.
Video.title: Special Enforcement Detail Work

Video.summary: The Western El Dorado Narcotics Enforcement Team shines a light on the destruction of our public land by illegal commercial Mexican cartel grows.
Video.title: Marijuana vs. the Environment

Video.summary: Deputies respond to an ongoing fight between drug users in Pollock Pines. A business owner claims she is being harassed and victimized.
Video.title: Meth Freaks Abound
